eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kendall, TX; at 2:22 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 2:52 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Guadalupe River Rising in Kerr County and moving down stream. SEEK HIGHER GROUND.
 - B. Constantine Kendall County OEM
